mapper.sql: comments_code AS commentsCode, comments_name AS commentsName, parent_code AS parentCode, parent_codes AS parentCodes, tree_sort AS treeSort, tree_sorts AS treeSorts, tree_leaf AS treeLeaf, tree_level AS treeLevel, tree_names AS treeNames, user_id AS userId, merchants_id AS merchantsId, content, state, service_score AS serviceScore, efficiensy_score AS efficiensyScore, create_date AS createDate, update_date AS updateDate
mapper.select:
SELECT a.comments_code commentCode, b.id id, b.name userName, b.avatar url, a.content counts, round((service_score+efficiensy_score)/2,1) score, a.create_date countTime FROM app_merchants_comments_tree AS a LEFT JOIN app_user AS b ON a.user_id = b.id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{merchantsId} AND tree_level = 0
AND type = #{type}
AND (a.efficiensy_score+a.service_score)/2 >= 4
AND (efficiensy_score+service_score)/2 > 2 AND (efficiensy_score+service_score)/2 < 4
AND (efficiensy_score+service_score)/2 <= 2
AND have_img = 1
ORDER BY a.create_date DESC limit #{pagesize},20

SELECT comments_code commentsCode, comments_code commentsName, parent_code parentCode, parent_codes parentCodes, tree_sort treeSort, tree_sorts treeSorts, tree_leaf treeLeaf, tree_level treeLevel, tree_names treeNames, state state, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE parent_code = #{parentCode}

SELECT comments_code commentsCode, comments_code commentsName, parent_code parentCode, parent_codes parentCodes, tree_sort treeSort, tree_sorts treeSorts, tree_leaf treeLeaf, tree_level treeLevel, tree_names treeNames, state state, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE parent_code = 0 ORDER BY comments_code desc LIMIT 0,1

SELECT comments_code commentsCode, comments_code commentsName, parent_code parentCode, parent_codes parentCodes, tree_sort treeSort, tree_sorts treeSorts, tree_leaf treeLeaf, tree_level treeLevel, tree_names treeNames, state state, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE comments_code = #{parentCode}
SELECT content FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE user_id = #{id} AND user_b_id = #{merchantsCode}
SELECT MAX(CAST(comments_code as SIGNED INTEGER)) commentsCode FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE parent_code = 0

SELECT SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND parent_code = 0 AND type = 12),1,0)) allCount, SUM(if(((efficiensy_score+service_score)/2 >=4 AND parent_code = 0 AND type = 12 AND user_b_id = #{userBId}),1,0)) AS highPraiseCount, SUM(if(((efficiensy_score+service_score)/2 > 2 AND (efficiensy_score+service_score)/2 < 4 AND parent_code = 0 AND type = 12 AND user_b_id = #{userBId}),1,0)) AS midBabCount, SUM(if(((efficiensy_score+service_score)/2 <=2 AND parent_code = 0 AND type = 12 AND user_b_id = #{userBId}),1,0)) AS badReviewCount, SUM(if((have_img = 1 AND parent_code = 0 AND type = 12 AND user_b_id = #{userBId}),1,0)) AS haveImgCount FROM app_merchants_comments_tree

SELECT comments_code commentsCode, a.user_id userId, a.user_b_id userBId, a.create_date createDate, content content, service_score serviceScore FROM app_merchants_comments_tree as a
left join app_b_user as b ON b.id = a.user_b_id
WHERE parent_code = 0
AND b.type = 1 AND b.brand_id = #{brandId}
AND a.service_score = 5
ORDER BY a.create_date DESC limit #{pageSize},20
